RavePartyFeverRules.Rule1: Rave Party Fever is a 7 by 7 symbols combination video slot featuring various features and winning symbols collection.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

RavePartyFeverRules.Rule3: At every spin, any combinations of 5 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
RavePartyFeverRules.Rule4: For every winning combination, payout is made for each symbol according to the Paytable.
RavePartyFeverRules.Rule5: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the “Paytable” multiplied by bet size and bet level.
RavePartyFeverRules.Rule6: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
RavePartyFeverRules.Rule7: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
RavePartyFeverRules.Rule8: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols.

FeatureActivationExplanation.FeatureActivationExplain1: At the start of any main game spin, 3 activation spots are randomly positioned on the reels behind the symbols.
FeatureActivationExplanation.FeatureActivationExplain2: Any wins involving the symbol with the yellow activation spot will activate the Bass Blast Feature.
FeatureActivationExplanation.FeatureActivationExplain3: Any wins involving the symbol with the green activation spot will activate the Mass Transform Feature.
FeatureActivationExplanation.FeatureActivationExplain4: Any wins involving the symbol with the red activation spot will activate the Wild Deejay Feature.
FeatureActivationExplanation.FeatureActivationExplain5: When there is no more win on the reels and there is at least one activated feature, the activated feature(s) will be triggered (following the sequence of Bass Blast Feature, Mass Transform Feature and Wild Deejay Feature).
FeatureActivationExplanation.FeatureActivationExplain6: Bass Blast Feature, Mass Transform Feature and Wild Deejay Feature can only be triggered once each in the main game.

RavePartyFeverFeatureExplanation.BassBlastExplain: When the Bass Blast Feature is triggered, all Ace symbols, King symbols, Queen symbols and Jack symbols on the reels will be removed.
RavePartyFeverFeatureExplanation.MassTransformExplain: When the Mass Transform Feature is triggered, 10 symbols (either Disco Ball symbol, Turntable symbol, Headphones symbol or Microphone symbol) will be randomly added to the reels.
RavePartyFeverFeatureExplanation.WildDeejayExplain: When the Wild Deejay Feature is triggered, 7 Wild symbols will be randomly added to the reels.

RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain1: During any main game spin, winning symbols that explode will be accumulated in the collection bar above the reels.
RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain2: The collection bar will reset to zero at the start of any spin.
RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain3: If 65 winning symbols are collected, the Bonus Feature is triggered during the round with no winning combination.
RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain4: At the start of the Bonus Feature, the Bass Blast Feature, Mass Transform Feature and Wild Deejay Feature are all activated.
RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain5: After any feature is triggered, the corresponding activation spot will return to a random position on the reels.
RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain6: At the start of the Bonus Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain7: During the Bonus feature, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
RavePartyFeverBonusFeature.BonusExplain8: The Bonus Feature ends when there is no winning combination and no activated feature.
